# response.d

```ts
import { z } from 'zod';
/**
 * API 错误结构 schema
 */
export declare const apiErrorSchema: z.ZodObject<{
    code: z.ZodString;
    message: z.ZodString;
    details: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodUnknown>;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    message: string;
    code: string;
    details?: unknown;
}, {
    message: string;
    code: string;
    details?: unknown;
}>;
export type ApiError = z.infer<typeof apiErrorSchema>;
/**
 * 成功响应类型
 */
export type ApiSuccessResponse<T = unknown> = {
    success: true;
    data: T;
};
/**
 * 错误响应类型
 */
export type ApiErrorResponse = {
    success: false;
    error: ApiError;
};
/**
 * 统一 API 响应类型（前后端共享）
 * - success: true 时为 ApiSuccessResponse
 * - success: false 时为 ApiErrorResponse
 */
export type ApiResponse<T = unknown> = ApiSuccessResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse;
```
